description: Wire the existing AI feedback signal (thumbs up/down in AIInsightCard + AIIntelligenceSheet AIFeedbackView) into a real reinforcement loop. RecommendationMemory storage layer already exists (record/outcomes/acceptanceRate/frequentlyDismissedSignals/clearAll) and has unit tests, but is per-AIOrchestrator-instance — not wired into views. C5 closes the deferred audit UI-024 by promoting RecommendationMemory to an injectable EnvironmentObject, wiring the actual record() call from AIInsightCard.recordFeedback (replacing the existing no-op comment block), feeding back into AIOrchestrator's recommendation pipeline (suppress signals with high dismiss-count + boost segments with high acceptance-rate), and surfacing a Settings → AI Feedback row showing history + GDPR clear-all. Pairs with D1 (adaptive-intelligence next pass).

dependencies_met.RecommendationMemory_storage_layer: shipped 2026-04-10 (FitTracker/AI/RecommendationMemory.swift — record + outcomes + acceptanceRate + frequentlyDismissedSignals + clearAll)
dependencies_met.AIInsightCard_feedback_buttons: shipped 2026-04-10 (private var feedbackButtons + recordFeedback function — fires analytics but no RecommendationMemory.record call)
dependencies_met.ValidatedRecommendation: shipped (carries segment + confidenceLevel + source needed for outcome recording)
dependencies_met.AnalyticsService.logAiFeedbackSubmitted: shipped 2026-04-10 (home_ai_feedback_submitted event with segment + rating params)
dependencies_met.homeReadinessAlertActionTaken + homeTren: shipped 2026-06-01 (C2 + C4 — established the action_taken pattern for sibling banners)

scope_known_gap.deferred_comment_at_AIInsightCard_record: Note (audit UI-024): Local RecommendationMemory recording deferred — RecommendationMemory is owned per-AIOrchestrator instance, not a shared singleton. Wiring requires either an EnvironmentObject pattern or a dedicated DI container.
scope_known_gap.what_c5_adds_beyond_wiring: Reinforcement loop in AIOrchestrator (consume RecommendationMemory.acceptanceRate + frequentlyDismissedSignals to suppress dismissed signals + boost accepted-signal confidence) + Settings → AI Feedback management surface + dismiss-reason picker

transitions.reason: C5 from 2026-05-31 tier carryover plan (RICE 9.0; second-highest agent-advanceable C-tier item after C4 shipped 2026-06-01). Operator directive: 'continue c5'.
